creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Sorry for the confusion. I don't use FreeCAD. As an apology and as part of testing Boost 1.69 fix backport the port was updated to 13541 as requested (i.e., not releases/FreeCAD-0-17 tip). Expect the binary packages for all supported FreeBSD versions in 2 days for /latest set, a bit later for /quarterly (if MFH is approved).
